phase: Phase 17 of ledger system buildout — second Page Ledger
primary_component: IntakeScreen in screens.jsx (with IntakeReportsList, IntakeReportDetail, IntakeDocumentCard)
purpose: Document-ingest + Q&A surface for two kinds of reports: Box Reports (synthesized views over Auto/Client Boxes/<Name>/) and Workspaces (manual general-purpose). Two views one Box per DEC-2026-04-29-005..008.

box_reports.no_separate_storage: no report.json written into box folder (per DEC-2026-04-29-005)

workspaces.creation: manual via create modal (refuses slugs colliding with Client Box ids)

apis.box_report_behavior: 405 — refuses slug collisions with Client Box ids

apis.behavior: GENERIC ask path — box-aware agent config DEFERRED to Phase 2 per DEC-2026-04-29-008

data_sources: Auto/Client Boxes/<Name>/ (Box Reports — synthesized on every read)
Box Report ingest drops: Auto/Client Boxes/<Name>/intake_drops/<file>

box_report_writes.note: the Box stays the only writer of canonical content
conversation history is NOT written into the Box

risk_notes: Document ingest writes into Client Box folders, visible to orchestrator and any future scheduled fires
Q&A is paid — each ask call costs API tokens (provider per Settings tweaks.aiProvider)
Delegation handoff routes section text or Q&A turns to customer-facing channels via connectors.js

format_support: image (via OCR through provider vision path)
image_ocr_path: uses active Settings provider (Claude Code / OpenAI / Codex CLI per tweaks.aiProvider)
ingest_concurrency: per-report ingest lock prevents threaded write races (added 2026-04-27); client-side queue serializes uploads
source_of_truth_rules: renders Box Reports as synthesized views with same rank ordering as Boxes page (per SOURCE_OF_TRUTH §3.1). Ingest drops are NOT in the trust ordering — they're operator-supplied context, not canonical client truth.

supported_states.render: split rendering — Box Reports above Workspaces
standard report header with create-able actions

page_specific_guardrails: Q&A responses must obey Allowed-To-Know boundary even though box-aware agent config is deferred (DEC-008). Operator must apply discipline manually until Phase 2.
Ingest drops do NOT become canonical content automatically. Dropped documents are reference material; the Q&A LLM can read them but they're not comms records or client-confirmed truth.
Sending Q&A turns to delegations is highest-risk write on this page. LLM output is DRAFT material — never finalized customer copy.
Box Report identity is one-to-one with Client Box id. Slug-collision refusal on /api/reports/create enforces DEC-2026-04-29-006 — don't bypass.
Box Reports are read-on-demand. Past Q&A turns can become wrong if Box state shifted — operators should NOT treat past Q&A as durable truth.
page_done_gate_required_checks: if synthesized-view path changed: spot-checked against ≥3 Client Boxes (1 minimal-content, 2 normal); Box folder content reflects in synthesized payload
if new ingest path added: per-report lock holds; multi-file queue serializes; OCR fallback works for image-only files
if new Q&A capability added: cost estimated against bulk-ask scenario; provider-routing through tweaks.aiProvider honored
if right-click menu changed: cross-referenced in ASSET_WIDGET_MAP §3.3 + connectors.js for new send targets
if _box_report_* server helpers changed: confirm DEC-2026-04-29-005..008 semantics still hold
if new format added to ingest: extraction tested + Settings ledger noted if browser-use config involved

open_page_problems.detail: Ask path uses generic prompt assembly. Per-Box AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / 06_logic.md / 07_skills_used.md / 08_automations.md are NOT folded into system prompt.
open_page_problems.impact: Operator asking 'what should I tell Hugo?' gets generic LLM answer, not Hugo-aware one

open_page_problems.detail: Box Report detail doesn't surface client-specific analytics yet
Q&A LLM has access to profile + enrichment + plan. Without per-Box allowed_to_use.json, four-bucket model isn't enforced at Q&A time.
open_page_problems.fix: same fix path as Boxes page — Hugo first

open_page_problems.detail: No per-day or per-session cost cap on /api/reports/<slug>/ask. tweaks.demoMode blocks connector writes only — not ask calls.

open_page_problems.problem: Box Report ingest doesn't trigger orchestrator action
open_page_problems.detail: Document dropped into intake_drops/ is just sitting there. No automation reads from it today.
open_page_problems.future_warning: if a future automation watches intake_drops/, dropping a file becomes an action — operator should know

recent_changes_narrative.2026_04_29_phase_1_unification: Two-canonical-surfaces problem resolved. Box Reports synthesized over Auto/Client Boxes/<Name>/, refresh on read, slug=box_id. No drift surface; triad-aligned; one identity per Box (DEC-005..008). Cross-navigation: Boxes-page right-click → 'Open as Intake Report →'; Intake header 'open in boxes →' pill. Cache-busts: screens.jsx 94→95, app.jsx 52→53.
recent_changes_narrative.2026_04_27_preprocess_model_sync: Q&A preprocessor used to default to hardcoded mini model — output drift. Fix: preprocessor receives selected Settings model + carries through thinking-trace metadata. Settings provider exclusivity rule (per SETTINGS §7) only works if every chat-shaped path honors tweaks.aiProvider + tweaks.openaiModel. Cache-bust: screens.jsx 92→93.
recent_changes_narrative.2026_04_27_delegations_handoff_wiring: Right-click menus on documents and Q&A turns gained 'Send ... to delegations'. Risk increased — LLM output can route to customer-facing channels in one click. Why §9 guardrail #3 exists. Cache-bust: screens.jsx 75→76.
recent_changes_narrative.2026_04_27_right_click_polish: Context menus added across IntakeReportsList cards, IntakeReportDetail document cards, Q&A entries via shared useContextMenu hook. Reusable on any page (per ASSET_WIDGET_MAP §3.3). Cache-bust: screens.jsx 72→73.
recent_changes_narrative.2026_04_27_ingestion_hardening: Per-report ingest locks (server) + sequential client queue prevent threaded write races. Format support broadened (xlsx/xls, docx/doc, html, js/ts, yaml/xml/jsonl, image OCR via provider vision path). Removed friction without expanding risk. Cache-bust: screens.jsx 71→72.
recent_changes_narrative.2026_04_25_great_trim: Removed onAddCommitment prop and commitment-creation paths.

architectural_rationale.why: Reports list is split (Box Reports + Workspaces) instead of unified
architectural_rationale.because: two kinds have different lifecycles. Mixing with create/delete for everything would make slug-collision refusal feel like a bug instead of an architectural property.

architectural_rationale.why: Box Reports are synthesized instead of stored
architectural_rationale.because: DEC-2026-04-29-005. Copy creates drift surface; synthesized view does not. Cost: one Box-folder walk per /api/reports/get.
DEC-2026-04-29-006. One identity per Box across the app. Synthetic prefix would mean Intake and Boxes used different identifiers for the same thing.

architectural_rationale.why: ask path stays generic in Phase 1
architectural_rationale.because: DEC-2026-04-29-008. Phasing rule protects against half-finished architecture. Plumbing AGENTS.md ad-hoc would create parallel non-bus impl that re-wiring would have to rip out.

architectural_rationale.why: ingest writes into Box folder instead of side store
architectural_rationale.because: DEC-2026-04-29-005 consequence. Box stays only writer of canonical content. intake_drops/ lives inside the Box.

architectural_rationale.why: right-click menus instead of inline buttons
architectural_rationale.because: density. Reports list, document cards, Q&A turns are dense; right-click reveals on demand. Shared useContextMenu hook makes pattern reusable.

near_term_phase_2: Plumb per-Box AGENTS.md (and probably CLAUDE.md, 06_logic.md, 07_skills_used.md, 08_automations.md) into /api/reports/<slug>/ask system prompt when slug matches Client Box id
Add per-Box analytics templates to Box Report detail view
Wire Allowed-To-Know schema into Q&A prompt — when allowed_to_use.json exists, four-bucket model folded into system prompt
medium_term_phase_b: Intake-page steward audits Q&A history weekly. Surfaces patterns.
Per-Box AGENTS.md becomes runnable agent's prompt, dispatched via /api/agents/<box_id>/run for richer workflows than chat allows.
long_term_phase_c: Box Reports become window into live network
Ingest into intake_drops/ emits event automations can subscribe to (per BOX_BUS §2.1)
intake_drops/ shifts from 'operator reference material' to 'automation input surface' — §9 guardrail #5 becomes load-bearing

related_ledgers.external_data_origin: CONNECTIONS.md openai / claude_code / codex_cli (Q&A LLM provider routing per tweaks.aiProvider)

history.event: Phase 17 — initial creation. Second Page Ledger. 16-section deep-memory record covering: purpose, use case, route+render, data sources + APIs (10 endpoints documented with box-vs-workspace behavior matrices), writes/side-effects (split tables), SoT rules (Box Report rank ordering + ingest-drops-not-canonical), widgets, supported states (10 states), 5 page-specific guardrails (allowed-to-know, ingest-not-canonical, delegations-risk, identity-uniqueness, refresh-on-read), local-stricter Done Gate (10 checks), 5 open page problems (deferred config, deferred analytics, AtK pending, unbounded cost, future ingest-as-action), 7 narrative recent changes spanning 2026-04-25 → 2026-04-29 with the WHY behind each, 6 architectural rationale entries, future direction Phase 2 / Phase B / Phase C. Tier: domain. Cross-references sitemap as canonical. Companion files: intake.json, _README.md (status flipped intake → active). Companion Communications entry: COMM-2026-04-29-014.
